programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) A story about a heartless mother who betrayed her father and turned away from her sick younger brother for love and desire, and a daughter who dreams of revenge against such mother.

programme.title: Red Shoes - EP 33
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) A story about a heartless mother who betrayed her father and turned away from her sick younger brother for love and desire, and a daughter who dreams of revenge against such mother.

programme.title: A Good Supper - EP 21
programme.desc: (Dual Language Chinese and Korean) After Jiang Zhongquan tasted the beef soup made by Jin Yingxin, he couldn't believe that her soup would lose to Cui Shujing's seafood soup, so he decides to use Jin Yingxin's soup as the signature dish.

programme.title: A Good Supper - EP 22
programme.desc: (Dual Language Chinese and Korean) Jiang Zhongquan forced Cui Shujing to learn the soup base from Jin Yingxin. Reluctantly, Cui Shujing agrees to apologize to Zhen Qingxiu, but immediately changes her mind and made the dismissal of Lee Duojing a condition, pressuring Jin Yingxin to reveal the secret to the soup base.

programme.title: Singer 2025 - EP 19
programme.desc: The lineup of Singer 2025 once again features renowned artists from the Greater China region and beyond. The featuring singers include: Mickey Guyton, Beni, Shan Yi Chun, Terry Lin, Zhou Yan, Janice Vidal, Joyce Cheng, Christine Fan, A-Lin etc.

programme.title: Foodie Sisters - EP 6
programme.desc: Foodie Sisters Xiao and May embarked on a food challenge to bring viewers to different corner of Taiwan in search of good tasting food from places like Keelong, Xinzhu and Taoyuan.

programme.title: The Sassy Matchmaker - EP 21
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) PeiDeLuo returns NuoLi her lost locket and tells her that he is her long lost father. AhHuang tells LiDi that Uncle Pa tried to silence him but LiDi does not believe him.

programme.title: The Sassy Matchmaker - EP 22
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) NuoLi encourages LiDi when the investigation is not going well. LiDi's uncle urges him to quickly get engaged to XiaoWan. XiaoWan helps AhHuang to hide from the police.

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 67
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: The Tale Of Nokdu - EP 5
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Dong Dongzhu, who has prepared for certain death, enters the room only to be surprised and delighted to find Quan Ludou there.

programme.desc: Ji Xing (Tan Song Yun), refuses to endure the stifling corporate grind, she quits her job to embark on a challenging entrepreneurial journey and eventually secures the investment of Han Ting (Xu Kai). Together, they advance in the medical and health industry.

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go - EP 220
programme.desc: This large-scale variety show gathers showbiz entertainers to challenge each other in various hilarious educational games. Viewers at home are also encouraged to get in on the fun and try out the games with friends in real life!

programme.title: Hello, Saturday - EP 104
programme.desc: Helmed by the ever-popular veteran show host He Jiong, this all-new variety show features celebrity artistes from China, Hong Kong and Taiwan participating in song and dance performances, games and more.

programme.title: The Inn 4 - EP 12
programme.desc: Escape to a seaside inn where life slows down and joy takes over. Watch friends run a charming getaway, uncover surprises, and share heartfelt moments in a journey about companionship, healing, and the beauty of living well.

programme.title: The Legend of Zhuohua - EP 31
programme.desc: Mu Zhuo Hua (Jing Tian), the illegitimate daughter of the richest man in Jiangnan, is determined to pass the civil service exam. She meets a poorly reputable general named Liu Yan (Feng Shao Feng) and forms an uneasy alliance, which eventually deepens into a closer bond.

programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: Cinta Kan Membawamu Ke Titik Bahagia
programme.desc: Reno, a humble pecel (traditional peanut-salad) vendor, has no idea that his new acquaintance, Tiara, is completely faking a disability just to get close to him. Tiara is executing a secret mission assigned by Reno’s wealthy estranged father to monitor and investigate his daily life. However, trapped in her own web of lies, Tiara finds herself falling head over heels for Reno-who, ironically, has also begun to lose his heart to her

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021 - EP 65
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: Mahkotamu Ketinggalan di DC Cakung Queen
programme.desc: Keyla was shocked to meet Roy at the market. Roy accidentally saw Keyla, Keyla immediately ran into the market and accidentally hit Yudi in the market. The fruit that Yudi brought was all messed up. Keyla rushed to avoid Roy. Keyla wanted to find her family who had been separated for a long time.

programme.title: NAWAITU SURGA - EP 10
programme.desc: This program, which focuses on Islamic jurisprudence and Sufism, draws from everyday life stories and is delivered by highly knowledgeable Ustaz. Its aim is to enlighten us Muslims and guide us toward the ultimate goal of life: Jannah, or God's paradise.

programme.title: Cinta Bersemi di Sarang Sindikat No. 35
programme.desc: Rangga (Elryan Carlen) lands a high-stakes project to locate a missing child in exchange for a massive 1-billion-rupiah reward. As he dives into the investigation, his path crosses with Sari (Shanice Margaretha), who turns out to be an undercover police officer. As the two team up, their close collaboration sparks intense jealousy in Gadis (Michelle Joan).

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 20
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: THE SULTAN EMPIRE - EP 10
programme.desc: The Sultan Empire is a talk show featuring King Sultan Andre Taulany and Prince Raffi Ahmad, accompanied by a cast of hilarious royal guards. It features spectacular guest stars and is definitely not to be missed.

programme.title: GASPOL - EP 163
programme.desc: Gaspol, an SCTV game show hosted by Raffi Ahmad, is filled with prizes and tens of millions of rupiah in cash.

programme.title: Job Paling The B35T Adalah Mencintaimu
programme.desc: Determined to support her family's struggling finances, Dinda tackles any odd job she can find until she finally lands her dream career as a wedding planner. However, her excitement is cut short when she is forced to partner up with Zidan-a stubborn guy with whom she had just shared a fierce, chaotic argument. Now, the bitter rivals must learn to coordinate fairytale weddings together without destroying each other.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Yang Salah
programme.desc: Kirana (Jennifer Eve) is heartbroken because her boyfriend suddenly cheated on her with her stepsister, Oliv. Meanwhile, Kirana, who sells chicken eggs, has to deal with Julian (Andrew Andika), who annoys her. However, it turns out that Julian is also the one who saves Kirana when she's in trouble.

programme.desc: Thanks to the mysterious help of Zaheer (Fadi Alaydrus)-the enigmatic 'Captain 35'-Celine (Dinda Mahira), an insecure plus-sized girl, undergoes a stunning transformation into a beautiful woman. This sudden change leaves Aurel (Anya Taroreh) consumed by bitter jealousy, especially when the boy she has been crushing on completely shifts his attention to the newly transformed Celine.

programme.title: Lelepati Adalah Komunikasi Cinta Yang Hakiki
programme.desc: It tells the story of a beautiful girl named Tiara. It is said that Tiara did not study seriously while in college. This made Tiara's parents angry, so she was sent to her grandmother's village to take care of catfish. Tiara, who had to adapt to the new environment in the village, also had to respect Jaya, who often annoyed her. Even Jaya also received support from Tiara's grandmother. So why did Tiara suddenly start to like Jaya?

programme.desc: Does witnessing a murder mean your own life is forfeit? In the midst of her terror and desperation, the calm and protective Dion (Sandy Pradana) steps into her life, serving as her ultimate anchor and protector.

programme.title: Getuk Dangdut Pembawa Asmara Gak Rugi Doong

programme.title: KAMU GILA BUT I LOVE YOU
programme.desc: Popi (Larasati Nugroho) goes undercover, posing as her older sister Ninuk at a corporate office to pay for Ninuk's rising hospital bills. There, she meets Rangga (Ridho Ilahi), a corporate man 15 years her senior. The real chaos begins because Rangga has no idea that the seemingly incompetent employee he’s falling for is actually a 17-year-old minor in disguise

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 213
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Lirikan Kamu Lain Bikin Pengen Log In
programme.desc: Dinda (Shanice Margaretha) lands a job interview through a friend's recommendation, only to realize her new boss is Wildan (Aditya Zoni)-the very man who had just knocked her down in a reckless roadside accident. Despite their rocky start, working closely together begins to blur the lines between professionalism and romance.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 15
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 161
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: JURUS TUKANG ES KELAPA MEMETIK CINTA
programme.desc: Running away from an unwanted wedding, Wina (Larasati Nugroho) crosses paths with Jali (Randy Pangalila), a humble coconut ice vendor. The plot thickens when she realizes Jali is the son of Nyak Rodiah, the owner of the Kumbang Tanduk martial arts school-the bitter, long-time rival of her own family's school, Macan Merah

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 213
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Jangan Pinjol Hatiku, Nanti Semakin Berbunga
programme.desc: Drowning in family debt, Mita (Jennifer Eve) is pressured by her mother to find a wealthy husband to save them from financial ruin. She thinks she has hit the jackpot when she hooks the perfect rich bachelor, Dirga (Lucky Perdana). However, her dream turns into a shock when she discovers Dirga is actually the son of the very debt collector hunting her parents down.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 15

programme.title: CINTA GUDEG MERCON SENG ADA LAWAN
programme.desc: Jaya chooses a humble life selling spicy gudeg mercon (traditional jackfruit stew) over inheriting his father's multi-million company. Meanwhile, a newly bankrupt Neysa (Maudy Effrosina) is struggling to run her late mother’s catering business. When Neysa tries Jaya’s rustic dish for the first time, her stomach rebels, causing her to vomit. The crowd mistakenly panics, assuming Jaya’s gudeg is poisonous, sparking a fierce rivalry between the two food vendors

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 213
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Jangan Ya Dek Ya, Dia Pilih Pemeran Utama
programme.desc: Determined to avoid an arranged marriage with a wealthy man named Ray, Vina forces her best friend, Dila-a local durian ice vendor-to take her place. Little does Dila know, Ray had the exact same idea and sent his best friend, Kenan, to impersonate him. When the two fake identities meet, they introduce themselves with entirely different aliases, leading to a hilarious web of lies and romance.

programme.title: BABANG JEMPUTNYA SATU CINTANYA BANYAK
programme.desc: Marni (Enzy Storia) is furious when her charge switches to a new school shuttle driven by Bagyo (Dimaz Andrean). Terrified of losing her only source of income as a babysitter, Marni vows to make Bagyo pay for stealing her client. However, as she plans her revenge, she discovers that Bagyo is definitely not your average school bus driver

programme.title: CINTAKU NYASAR KE PANTI ASUHAN
programme.desc: Niken (Gesya Shandy) courageously steps in to save Dion (Rizky Alatas) from an angry mob, only to discover that Dion is a ruthless developer planning to demolish the orphanage she protects. Later, when Dion gets into a severe accident, Niken saves his life once again. To repay his immense debt of gratitude, Dion is forced to live and work at the orphanage for a whole month.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 214
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cincin Keberuntungan Bikin Lost Interest Jadi Love Interest
programme.desc: After enduring a seemingly endless streak of bad luck and disasters, Maira's (Rachquel Nesia) life takes a sudden, miraculous turn for the better the exact moment she crosses paths with a charming man named Faiz (Ridho Illahi).

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 16
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 162
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: CINTAKU NYASAR KE PANTI ASUHAN
programme.desc: Niken (Gesya Shandy) courageously steps in to save Dion (Rizky Alatas) from an angry mob, only to discover that Dion is a ruthless developer planning to demolish the orphanage she protects. Later, when Dion gets into a severe accident, Niken saves his life once again. To repay his immense debt of gratitude, Dion is forced to live and work at the orphanage for a whole month.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 214
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cincin Keberuntungan Bikin Lost Interest Jadi Love Interest
programme.desc: After enduring a seemingly endless streak of bad luck and disasters, Maira's (Rachquel Nesia) life takes a sudden, miraculous turn for the better the exact moment she crosses paths with a charming man named Faiz (Ridho Illahi).

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 16
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 162
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: KAMU GILA BUT I LOVE YOU
programme.desc: Popi (Larasati Nugroho) goes undercover, posing as her older sister Ninuk at a corporate office to pay for Ninuk's rising hospital bills. There, she meets Rangga (Ridho Ilahi), a corporate man 15 years her senior. The real chaos begins because Rangga has no idea that the seemingly incompetent employee he’s falling for is actually a 17-year-old minor in disguise

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 214
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Lirikan Kamu Lain Bikin Pengen Log In
programme.desc: Dinda (Shanice Margaretha) lands a job interview through a friend's recommendation, only to realize her new boss is Wildan (Aditya Zoni)-the very man who had just knocked her down in a reckless roadside accident. Despite their rocky start, working closely together begins to blur the lines between professionalism and romance.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 16
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 162
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: JURUS TUKANG ES KELAPA MEMETIK CINTA
programme.desc: Running away from an unwanted wedding, Wina (Larasati Nugroho) crosses paths with Jali (Randy Pangalila), a humble coconut ice vendor. The plot thickens when she realizes Jali is the son of Nyak Rodiah, the owner of the Kumbang Tanduk martial arts school-the bitter, long-time rival of her own family's school, Macan Merah

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 214
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Jangan Pinjol Hatiku, Nanti Semakin Berbunga
programme.desc: Drowning in family debt, Mita (Jennifer Eve) is pressured by her mother to find a wealthy husband to save them from financial ruin. She thinks she has hit the jackpot when she hooks the perfect rich bachelor, Dirga (Lucky Perdana). However, her dream turns into a shock when she discovers Dirga is actually the son of the very debt collector hunting her parents down.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 16
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA GUDEG MERCON SENG ADA LAWAN
programme.desc: Jaya chooses a humble life selling spicy gudeg mercon (traditional jackfruit stew) over inheriting his father's multi-million company. Meanwhile, a newly bankrupt Neysa (Maudy Effrosina) is struggling to run her late mother’s catering business. When Neysa tries Jaya’s rustic dish for the first time, her stomach rebels, causing her to vomit. The crowd mistakenly panics, assuming Jaya’s gudeg is poisonous, sparking a fierce rivalry between the two food vendors

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 163
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Biarin Gombal Yang Penting Manisnya Pas
programme.desc: Nita (Amanda Salmakhira) faces relentless bullying from her college peers, especially Sarah, because of her weight. However, Arya (Ridho Illahi), a handsome assistant lecturer, constantly steps in to protect and defend her. Deep down, Nita reminds Arya of his long-lost childhood friend, Tata, driving him on a mission to uncover if Nita is the girl he has been searching for all these years

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 215
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Pesona Bertebaran Boss Panutan
programme.desc: Bimantara (Naufal Samudra) initially approaches Livia (Shanice Margaretha) purely to climb the corporate ladder and snatch a high-profile position in her company. However, his presence becomes a breath of fresh air for Livia, who is reeling from a painful breakup after discovering her ex, Devan (Rizky Fachrel), cheated with her business rival, Marsya (Gabriella Larasati). Eager to protect her, Bimantara teams up with Livia to expose her ex's corporate and romantic betrayal.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 17
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 42
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Awak Suka Saya Tak? - EP 11
programme.desc: Intan mencintai Hilman Yong, Sejak kemalangan berlaku Hilman hilang menjadi Damien Yong. Kini Intan terpaksa menyayangi bekas suaminya dari jauh dan menunggu Hilman kembali kepadanya.

programme.title: Expose Mistik: Kisah Seram - EP 9
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan seram untuk tontonan.

programme.title: Kennot Brain - EP 20
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Isteri VS. Tunang - EP 1
programme.desc: Alana Sofea, seorang gadis yang berterus terang, mencabar ego Zaim Azfar, seorang lelaki yang sombong dan angkuh, lalu membawa mereka ke dalam perkahwinan yang tidak dijangka.

programme.title: Boss Kira S2 - EP 7
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: Fan Fanatik - EP 9
programme.desc: Menampilkan dua pasukan yang terdiri daripada ahli kelab peminat selebriti tempatan bersaing di antara satu sama lain bagi mendapatkan takhta fan fanatik.

programme.title: Cik Reen Encik Ngok Ngek - EP 12
programme.desc: Azreen dan Harris terpaksa berkahwin apabila adik mereka melarikan diri pada malam sebelum bernikah. Adakah perkahwinan Harris dan Azreen akan berkekalan selepas Roadtrip Misadventures mereka?

programme.title: 3 dara kg.com - EP 4
programme.desc: 3 Dara nak buat bisnes produk kecantikan sendiri menggunakan modal pinjaman dari Tabung JKK Kampung Kembang Kempis. Mereka ditipu oleh Kulup Q , di mana duit dah dibayar tetapi barang tak dapat.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 10
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Punchline - EP 7
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Elak Elak - EP 4
programme.desc: Edisi Istimewa Lawak Siang dan Malam bersama Elak - Elak.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Dato’ AC Mizal kini Kembali Bersama geng latah seperti Eida Moin, PS Mansur, Wan Raja Lawak dan ramai lagi dalam musim terbaru Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat.

programme.title: Bujang 40 - EP 5

programme.desc: Zulaikha merupakan seroang gadis bandar yang mencabar diri untuk hidup di kampung lalu terpikat dengan jejaka kampung yang berjaya menawan hatinya.

programme.title: Jihan Show S2 - EP 10

programme.title: Jutawan Ekspres - EP 1
programme.desc: Keluarga miskin berpindah ke kejiranan kaya selepas menjadi jutawan serta merta. Masing-masing cuba untuk hidup sebagai 'orang kaya' mengikut cara mereka sendiri.

programme.title: Gelap Geli Tak (HD) - EP 7
programme.desc: Game show terbaru di hoskan oleh Faizal Ismail. Peserta bersaing antara satu sama lain dalam pelbagai cabaran, tapi muslihatnya mereka ditempatkan dalam persekitaran gelap gelita

programme.title: Opera Sabun Boboi - EP 7
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Sorry, Sengaja! - EP 2
programme.desc: Rancangan "prank" yang berlaku di pejabat Astro, melibatkan pekerja-pekerja yang selalunya tidak menjangka akan sesuatu berlaku. Rancangan ini dikepalai oleh beberapa "prankster" dari Thinker Studios.

programme.title: Ubi Superstar Live - EP 4
programme.desc: Bersama juara Fad Bocey, Namie, Sharif Zero, Shuib Sepahtu dan Ajak Shiro, saksikan mereka mempersembahakn sebuah program muzikal komedi terbaru yang bakal menggamatkan suana.

programme.title: Biniku Ninja - EP 17
programme.desc: Azlan berasal dari keluarga susah yang akhirnya berjaya merantau ke UK setelah mendapat tawaran menyambung ijazah dalam aliran seni. Kisah bermula apabila beliau berjumpa dengan seorang gadis

programme.title: Sembang Teh Tarik S3 - EP 2
programme.desc: Sembang Teh Tarik yang dikendalikan Datuk AC Mizal ia merupakan program 'talk show' yang terbaru dan santai sesuai untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Elak Elak - EP 3
programme.desc: Komedi yang dipentaskan oleh gabungan pelawak tanahair menampilkan pelbagai isu berkaitan kesilapan yang sering berlaku dalam kehidupan seharian kita.

programme.title: Arena Panas : Pro VS Bro S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Bersama barisan atlit handal dan selebriti popular tanah air, sakasikan mereka berentap dalam acara sukan dan permainan menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: Sorok - Sorok - EP 8
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.title: Lawak Minggu Ini - EP 8
programme.desc: Kompilasi lawak terbaik minggu ini untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Warung Sepahtu - EP 3
programme.desc: Jep, Shuib, Rahim & Pakya akan bersembang di Warung sepahtu bersama tetamu undangan mereka.

programme.title: Lawak Tak Lagho - EP 6
programme.desc: Istimewa bersama pakar motivasi Samsul Debat dan barisan pelawak, saksikan mereka berkongsi kisah menarik dan lucu bersama penonton.

programme.title: Berita Hangit - EP 3
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Pesta Muda Mudi - EP 1
programme.desc: Memberi penghargaan kepada lagu-lagu pop Malaysia sepanjang zaman dari tahun 1930 hingga ke tahun 2010 untuk dipersembahkan oleh artis tempatan dalam bentuk akustik.

programme.title: Tapao - EP 5
programme.desc: Kembara mencari makan menyajikan keindahan visual. Tapi bagaimana jika hidangan itu dibungkus? Adakah sama enak di meja restoran? Kena dengan namanya, Tapao mencari jawapan di sebalik persoalan ini.

programme.title: Makan - EP 13
programme.desc: Meneroka masakan yang lain dari yang lain, memberikan tips mudah ketika di dapur dan membawa anda ke restoran-restoran yang terkemuka di sekitar Kuala Lumpur

programme.title: Warna Live: Arena Panggang - EP 13
programme.desc: Siapakah yang paling handal memanggang dan siapakah yang bakal dipanggang?

programme.title: Masaklah Kau - EP 10
programme.desc: Rancangan masakan yang menguji kreativiti dan kecekapan selebriti untuk menyediakan hidangan kepada tetamu misteri menggunakan 3 bahan yang tersedia.

programme.title: Kalau Berani Kampung Stail - EP 6
programme.desc: Setiap minggu Sherry dan ketua kumpulan akan di bawa ke kampung yang berlainan bersama artis jemputan untuk menolong ketua kumpulan memenangi perlawanan mingguan

programme.title: Kak Lina Ter-Over Take Over - EP 1
programme.desc: Saksikan gelagat Kak Lina Pom Pom yang kecoh dan lucu bersama para tetamu jemputan melakukan cabaran istimewa yang pasti mencuit hati anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Fan Fanatik - EP 11
programme.desc: Menampilkan dua pasukan yang terdiri daripada ahli kelab peminat selebriti tempatan bersaing di antara satu sama lain bagi mendapatkan takhta fan fanatik.

programme.title: Maharaja Lawak Mega 2019 - EP 5
programme.desc: Rancangan komedi yang penuh gelak tawa untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Berita Hangit - EP 3
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: The Cadets - EP 1
programme.desc: Mengisahkan perjuangan empat sekawan - Amir, Farah, Hakim dan Liz - untuk membuktikan bahawa pasukan mereka mampu mengatasi segala cabaran untuk mewakili Kadet bomba di Kem Jamboree Kebangsaan.

programme.title: Gerak Geri Gen Z - EP 1
programme.desc: Sebuah eksplorasi 4 sahabat remaja perempuan Cik B, Ara, Alyssa dan Qadejah di Turki. Mereka menelusuri kota bersejarah dan budaya.

programme.title: The Chosen One 2024 - EP 1
programme.desc: Saksikan kehebatan bakat-bakat muda yang akan mempersembahkan nyanyian terbaik mereka di bawah bimbingan barisan penyanyi terkemuka tanahair sebagai coach!

programme.title: Hikayat Bawang Putih Bawang Merah - EP 1
programme.desc: Bawang Putih tinggal bersama ibu tiri dan adik tiri dan setiap hari didera. Putih melarikan diri dan bertembung dengan Putera rupawan di dalam hutan Inderaloka.

programme.title: Travel Lawak - EP 1
programme.desc: Sebuah program travelog yang menampilkan tiga pelawak popular iaitu Syuk, Sharif Zero dan Mamak Puteh di mana mereka akan mengembara ke luar negara dan meneroka sendiri budaya dan tempat-tempat menarik.

programme.title: Prankap Show - EP 1
programme.desc: Saksikan selebriti popular merancang "prank" bersama geng mereka dan mengenakan mangsa terpilih. Berjayakan perancangan "prank" mereka? Sama-sama kita nantikan!

programme.title: Bas Ria - EP 13
programme.desc: Bas Ria bakal menyaksikan pasukan Bas Ria "memburu" selebriti-selebriti di dalam "hit list" mereka? Untuk apa? Untuk mendapatkan sesuatu yang berharga dari mereka.

programme.title: The Maid - EP 3
programme.desc: Kehidupan Jay dan empat orang isterinya nampak bahagia namun hakikatnya isteri - isterinya saling membenci. Konflik terjadi apabila isteri ke-4 dibunuh. Siapakah pembunuhnya?

programme.title: Cik Misi 123 - EP 19
programme.desc: Ramai yang terkejut bila mengetahu Dr Aish mahu berhenti kerja secara tiba-tiba. Oya diteguri kerana tidak focus di dalam kuliah. Kerana mash cemburu, Mika mula tidak endahkan Oya.

programme.title: Split TV Series - EP 4
programme.desc: Maryam akan berkahwin dengan Mikael . Maryam tidak mengetahui Mikael menghidap Dissociative Identity Disorder, satu jasad tujuh personality berbeza di dalamnya.

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories S2 - EP 13
programme.desc: Nusantara merupakan satu daerah yang tebal dengan semangat mistik dan alam ghaib. Setiap episod mempunyai penyelesaian yang unik bergantung kepada jenis gangguan, jenis jin dan kesan ke atas watak utama.

programme.title: Konti Karat - EP 3
programme.desc: Sebuah program bual bicara yang berformat baru dan di hos kan oleh Shuib Sepahtu bersama-sama tetamu undangannya.

programme.title: DramaVaganza: Dendam Cinta Arissa - EP 9
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Arissa & Zariman musnah apabila Rafeal melanggar Zariman dan melarikan diri untuk mengejar isterinya. Ingin jujur pada Arissa namun Rafeael jatuh cinta dengan Arissa tanpa sengaja.

programme.title: Love Elsa - EP 21

Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Cic Tour De La Provence 2026
programme.desc: It is an unmissable cycling event and a perfect training ground for the Tour de France: the 10th edition of the CIC Tour de La Provence took place from 13 to 15 February 2026. At the start, 16 teams of 7 riders, 542 kilometres in 3 stages between Marseille and Arles.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Capitaine Marleau - EP 28
programme.desc: After many years without contact, talented blacksmith Florence Rougier crosses paths again with her adoptive brother, Olivier Garcin. When he is found murdered, Marleau looks into their strange family history. Faced with investigators, Florence's relatives remain united and uncooperative.

programme.title: Itineraires Paysans - EP 1
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: Les Regles Du Jeu
programme.desc: Lolita does not like to smile. Kevin does not know how to sell himself. Hamid does not like bosses. At 20, without any diploma, they are looking for work. For six months, the coaches from a placement agency will teach them the behaviour and language one must have today to land a job.

programme.title: Les Patins
programme.desc: Mina loves skating. Today, her father, recently divorced from her mother, is accompanying her to her first figure skating lesson...

programme.title: Terrain De Jeu - EP 1
programme.desc: Raed Hammoud travels to the heart of the Indian Ocean, to a tiny island in the Maldives. In this paradisiacal archipelago, where cricket fans are numerous, he visits the Mahibadhoo stadium, renamed the Pele Stadium. It's a chance to meet supporters who are passionate about football.

programme.title: Terrain De Jeu - EP 2
programme.desc: In northern Argentina, Raed Hammoud discovers the Purmamarca stadium, described by FIFA President Gianni Infantino as ''the most beautiful pitch in the world''. In Buenos Aires, he measures the passion of Argentinians for their favourite?sport and their national heroes, Messi and Maradona.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 8
programme.desc: This painter and fashion photographer turns his painting into his own cinema. Between abstraction and figuration, Chris Carolina's work reveals a quest for purity, love and sincerity, with the figure of woman placed at the center of his reflections.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Interieurs - EP 17
programme.desc: In the Paris region, Anne-Catherine Verwaerde visits a ''secret'' flea market and a colorful workshop that revives the art of cement tiles.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes - EP 47
programme.desc: In Pont-d'Ouilly, the Coing grocery store specializes in organic, local and artisanal products. Meeting a couple who started marketing reusable toothbrushes. In the Caen plain, volunteers have set themselves the mission of saving old apple varieties.

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: L'actu
programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rts
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 49
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 50
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Fara - EP 13
programme.desc: Fara and Koto are two children born with disabilities. Seeing this as a curse, their parents plan to bury them alive to ward it off. Thanks to the kindness of their brothers and sisters, they narrowly escape and embark on a fantastic adventure.

programme.title: C'est Mathematique ! Avec Iman - EP 3
programme.desc: Iman, a former maths teacher, offers primary school pupils a survival kit to help them approach secondary school with confidence. In each episode, using a fun and educational approach, he aims to make his subject clear and practical.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans Ca - EP 41
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: Les Jeux De La Fontaine - EP 6
programme.desc: Ox is en-route to losing the tennis final: he's accidentally destroyed all his equipment.

programme.title: Belfort Et Lupin - EP 3
programme.desc: Belfort, the king's dog, and Lupin, the wolf of the gardens, live in the Palace of Versailles. As inseparable as they are unlikely, they come to the rescue of all their furry and feathered friends, from the royal menagerie to the local wildlife.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 48
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 29
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 39
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Roi Keita - EP 25
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Mission Info
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! Each episode, devised for children and their parents, provides insight accessible to younger ones, combined with explanations, immersive reports and expert interviews. An educational quiz also gives children the chance to test their knowledge in a fun way.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 9
programme.desc: Glass is their favorite medium. Martine and Jacki Perrin work with four hands and sculpt pieces with original colors and lines, constantly playing with transparency, porosity and above all with light.

programme.title: Falo
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'hebdo
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.title: L'instant Roland-Garros - EP 14
programme.desc: The daily roundup with full results, the best discussions and not-to-be missed highlights.

programme.title: L'echappee Belge - EP 2
programme.desc: Actor Roda Fawaz is cycling through the Avesnois regional nature park, nicknamed the secret garden of the Ch'tis. A green immersion just a stone's throw from the Belgian border.

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera - EP 93
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 8
programme.desc: Elected best sommelier in Switzerland in 2015, Jerome is the ambassador of Chasselas in the canton of Vaud. Yet he was born far from the vineyards, in Ivory Coast, where he first trained in hospitality. Now settled in the heart of the Leman vineyards, he makes wine a language blending memory and culture.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match - EP 89
programme.desc: She's a huge star, a legend of French and world athletics. Double world champion, triple Olympic champion, an exceptional record in French sport: Marie-Jose Perec is Pierre Classen's guest.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Generation F - EP 12
programme.desc: They challenge artistic codes and embody a living, bold and committed art. Richard Orlinski meets Laura Huang Li, a designer with Franco-Chinese influences, who reinvents floral art with a minimalist approach inspired by ikebana. Together, they create a sculpture combining anemones, poppies and hydrangeas, a subtle blend of rigor and spontaneity. Adeline Rappaz is a Swiss high-end ready-to-wear designer, drawing inspiration from urbex, the living and the ephemeral.

programme.title: Hep Taxi !
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Guides D'aventures - EP 5
programme.desc: Ken Belanger is a mountain guide and off-piste skiing specialist on Hokkaido, Japan's most northerly island. He welcomes five skiers who have come to live an extraordinary experience in this powder snow paradise. The group climb Mount Asahi, the island's highest peak.

programme.title: Peaux Noires : Quel Heritage ? - EP 1
programme.desc: What intimate and social relationship do Black French-speaking people have with their skin color? Through personal testimonies, expert contributions and innovative visual staging, the series explores the historical and cultural evolution of the representation of Black skin.

programme.title: Tendance Xxi
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 11
programme.desc: Off to Montreal to discover the Musee des Beaux-Arts. Guided by meditation, Mathias Bensimon creates profound and luminous canvases. Haider Ackermann expresses the sensuality and eroticism so dear to Tom Ford, while adding a touch of poetry and gentleness. Sculptor Salome Cousseau shapes wood with passion and elegance.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: Savourer - EP 26
programme.desc: On the menu: queen scallop carpaccio, scallop casserole, Portuguese-style mussels, San Francisco cioppino.Presented by: Genevieve O'Gleman.

programme.title: Parlons Eco
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: 100 % Logique - La Reponse Est Sous Vos Yeux - EP 21
programme.desc: The quiz that, rather than testing general knowledge and culture, tests the participants' powers of logic, observation and common sense. One hundred candidates compete for a jackpot that could climb to 100,000 euros. Who will manage to overcome all the obstacles and reach the final question?

programme.title: Noir Comme Neige - L'oeil Du Diable
programme.desc: In Switzerland, Captain Meyer narrowly escapes death after receiving a statuette of a devil with red eyes. An inexplicable coincidence: on the French side, the same object is found by gendarme Vivier near the body of a timber dealer mysteriously deceased in an isolated chapel.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: Stay tuned as Deutsche Welle (DW), Germany's international broadcaster presents the country’s news, current affairs and showcases its people's life and mentality.

programme.desc: The Middle East conflict is being felt in London: Growing tensions and rising antisemitism are unsettling the Jewish community. +++ In France, a tunnel through the Alps has residents, environmentalists, and transportation experts worried.

programme.desc: René grew up without ever seeing someone like himself on TV. He saw people with disabilities portrayed as angry, broken or dangerous. So he decided to change it: René helped create Elin, the first character with a visible disability in the German version of Sesame Street.

programme.title: PGA Tour 2026 the Memorial Tournament p/b Workday Round 1 (Live)
programme.desc: The Memorial Tournament is a PGA Tour golf tournament founded in 1976 by Jack Nicklaus. It is played on a Nicklaus-designed course at Muirfield Village Golf Club in Dublin, Ohio, a suburb north of Columbus. One of the features of the tournament is a yearly induction ceremony honoring past golfers. A plaque for each honoree is installed near the clubhouse at Muirfield. It is one of only five tournaments given "invitational" status by the PGA Tour.

programme.desc: The U.S. Women's Open, one of 15 national golf championships conducted by the United States Golf Association (USGA), is the oldest of the LPGA Tour's 5 major championships. Established 79 years ago in 1946, the U.S. Women's Open is the only event to have been recognized as a major by the LPGA since the group's founding in 1950. The U.S. Women's Open is open to any professional or amateur female golfer.

programme.title: DP World Tour 2026 (Live)
programme.desc: The Dutch Open is an annual golf tournament played in the Netherlands, and has been part of the European Tour's schedule since the Tour was inaugurated in 1972. Founded in 1912, the tournament began as the Dutch Open, before a variety of sponsors resulted in numerous name changes over the years. It is widely recognised as one of the best tournaments on the DP World Tour and is renowned for its relaxed atmosphere, as well as its activities for all ages.

programme.title: Crowned: The Story of the ICC Women’s T20 World Cup Final 2024
programme.desc: In October 2024, New Zealand and South Africa made their way to the final of the ICC Women’s T20 World Cup Final 2024 hosted in the UAE. programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: Set against one of the most dramatic seasons in recent memory, we explore the enduring intensity of the North London rivalry between Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur. We trace the origins of a feud shaped by geography, identity and decades of defining moments. We interweave the story of this season, which has reshaped the balance of power in North London and brings a fresh perspective to a rivalry already steeped in history.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 10
programme.desc: Patrick Vieira revisits the defining moments of his legendary Premier League career, counting down the 10 greatest memories from his time in England. From fierce rivalries and title triumphs to unforgettable performances in midfield, Vieira reflects on the moments that shaped his legacy as one of the Premier League's all-time greats.

programme.title: PL GOATS - EP 2
programme.desc: Italy has provided some of the greatest players to ever grace the Premier League. This week, we sit down with two Italian legends, Roberto Di Matteo and Gianfranco Zola to discuss the indelible mark of Italian players on the Premier League, and debate who are their greatest Italian players in league history.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 1
programme.desc: We sit down with Lee Bowyer to look back on the career of one of the Premier League's fiercest and most competitive midfielders. From his rise at Charlton to becoming a key figure in the brilliant Leeds United side that challenged Europe's elite and reached the Champions League semi-finals, Bowyer reflects on the highs, controversies and defining moments of his career, including spells with West Ham, Newcastle and Birmingham.

programme.title: REVIEW - MON 18 AUG
programme.desc: Review bursts into life with Matchweek 1 of the 2025/26 Premier League with a blockbuster Sunday showdown as Manchester United host Arsenal at Old Trafford. Chelsea face an immediate test against Crystal Palace, Wolves welcome Manchester City to Molinuex, and Liverpool kick-off their title defence against Bournemouth.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: Set against one of the most dramatic seasons in recent memory, we explore the enduring intensity of the North London rivalry between Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur. We trace the origins of a feud shaped by geography, identity and decades of defining moments. We interweave the story of this season, which has reshaped the balance of power in North London and brings a fresh perspective to a rivalry already steeped in history.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 40
programme.desc: Tyler Adams' story is one of dedication, commitment and sacrifice. From the early days when his mother would drive him hundreds of miles to training to pursue a dream, to the influence of his stepfather and three brothers, Adams' journey from MLS prospect to Premier League star has been a fascinating one.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (HAALAND)
programme.desc: From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 25/26 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - ERLING HAALAND'S 100
programme.desc: We celebrate Erling Haaland's record-breaking haul in true Netbusters' style, showcasing every one of his 100 Premier League goals, squeezed into a special 26-minute show.

programme.desc: Fulham have lost their last 18 meetings with Manchester City in all competitions, the longest losing run one side has had against another in English football history.

programme.title: Brighton and Hove Albion vs Aston Villa (MW14) - EP 135
programme.desc: Brighton have won just one of their last nine Premier League games against Aston Villa (D2 L6), a 1-0 home win in May 2024.

programme.desc: Crystal Palace are winless in their last 10 Premier League home games against Man City (D3 L7) since a 2-1 victory under Alan Pardew in April 2015.

programme.desc: Since their return to the competition in 2019, Aston Villa have won five of their 12 Premier League games against Arsenal (D1 L6), as many as they had in their previous 45 against the Gunners before relegation (D14 L26).

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Paul Williams vs. Verno Phillips
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. programme.title: Bipolar Rock n' Roller
programme.desc: A raw and unflinching account of Mauro Ranallo's decades-long struggle with Bipolar Affective Disorder. The voice of WWE and Showtime Championship Boxing, Ranallo has called some of the biggest sports events in history - all the while fighting his own epic battles with mental health Follow his journey in this 3-part series, as he combats the stigma behind mental health issues and sheds light on what it's like being at the top of the industry despite seemingly insurmountable odds.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Edison Miranda vs. Willie Gibbs
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Super Middleweights Edison Miranda (26-2, 23 KOs) vs. Willie 'The Gladiator' Gibbs (20-1, 16 KOs) from the Miccosukee Indian Gaming Resort in Miami, Florida, USA. Bonus coverage includes Jason Litzau, aka 'The American Boy' (20-1, 18 KOs) vs. Jose Hernandez (21-3, 13 KOs).

programme.title: Greatest Classics Marco Antonio Barrera vs. Agapito Sanchez
programme.desc: With the WBO Super Bantamweight World Championship on the line, titleholder Marco Antonio Barrera of Mexico takes on Dominican challenger Agapito Sanchez in front of a hot crowd at the Civic Center in South Padre Island, Texas. This would be the third defense for Barrera, who claimed the title with a decision victory over Daniel Jimenez earlier in the year. Sanchez was a worthy contender to the title, giving the 37-0 champion a much tougher challenge than he expected.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Juan Manuel Marquez vs. Michael Katsidis
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a highly-praised and hard-hitting lightweight championship fight featuring Juan Manuel Marquez and Michael Katsidis that was named HBO's 2010 Fight of the Year. Also on the card, welterweight champion Victor Ortiz.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. programme.desc: This episode features Saul (Canelo) Alvarez defending the WBC light middleweight title against Kermit Cintron, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 119
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa­Laa and Po drive to the Hidey Hup in the Tubby Car. They enjoy going on the Tubby Bouncy, the Tubby Uppy Downy, the Tubby Spinny and the Tubby Slidey.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S05 - EP 13
programme.desc: Green slippers, blue slippers, little slippers and big slippers. There are some surprises along the way and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S03 - EP 17
programme.desc: Messy accidentally removes the brakes from Mayor Oki's carnival float, but it turns out he really needs them. Will Messy be able to stop the runaway float?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 30
programme.desc: Somebody stole the big hand off the clock tower. Mojo and Bo are on the case, but it is not as simple as it seems. Soon, they are pulling off a heist they never expected.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 30
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 29
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 4
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part. First, they need to find their talents. After they spend some time searching, Narrator explains that 'finding their talents' means working out what they are good at. So, the Squirrels practise their skills until they are ready to face an audience.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 3
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. No worries, the Squirrels can run after him and give it back. They take all sorts of transport to catch Rhodri, and he is always one step ahead. Until finally, they're on a raft across the sea and land right by Rhodri's front door.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let’s play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 5
programme.desc: Glitch blocks Niagara Falls to give Grim HQ a mud bath, so the Go Jetters set out to fix the problem.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Bluey can't wait to get to the monkey bars as Dad takes her and Bingo on a wagon ride to the park. But her patience is tested when Dad keeps stopping to chat with other grown-ups.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 27
programme.desc: Dad has rudely plonked himself on one end of the seesaw. So Bluey and Bingo round up the entire playground to help flip him off, but they still need to find one more friend.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 43
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: When a weaver ant nest arrives damaged, Andy must stick it back together - but how? He jets off in his safari-mobile to Australia, discovering how weaver ants build their nests and what they use to stick the leaves together. Will Andy succeed? And will he get back to Safari World before Mr Hammond notices the other nest was destroyed?

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: It's a hot day in Playtime Towers, so Bella helps Lift cool down with a paper fan. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who has a flapping paper fan dance!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 51
programme.desc: Duggee's uniform is a bit old and needs to be updated. Duggee can make his own clothes!! Over the years Duggee has made lots of clothes. The Squirrels are very impressed and help to make some new clothes and present them at their fashion show. But will their Winter, Fall, Spring, Summer Duggee Collection! be a success?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 50
programme.desc: Roly is digging in the garden when his spade suddenly hits something. It's a key. But what does it do? Duggee has his key badge, they can find out through trial and error. The squirrels go on an adventure to work out what the key opens and what could be inside. But what is Trial and Error? Duggee explains that sometimes things work and sometimes they don't.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 49
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are enjoying a day at the beach, when they encounter the Penguins who explain they were on a very important mission when they got sick. They need to head to a nearby island but they are too poorly to sail the ship. Can Duggee and the squirrels help?

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 10
programme.desc: Is Glitch stealing tulips from the Netherlands? That's what the Go Jetters think and they almost ruin the parade Glitch and Tala are making a huge tulip flower float for.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 9
programme.desc: Inspired by her hero Amelia Earhart, Xuli attempts a solo flight across the Atlantic Ocean in a vintage plane.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S24 - EP 23

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 11
programme.desc: Cynthia asks Stanley to teach her to fly an aeroplane for Fifi's birthday. Stanley constructs a flight simulator and has the help of their friends to put her through her paces.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 10

programme.desc: When JoJo learns that Jared was too busy to have a birthday party, Gran Gran has a Gran Gran Plan to throw Jared a surprise belated birthday party!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 25
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 26
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 27
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 26
programme.desc: Happy sets his sights on a very questionable looking puddle that he is determined to splash in, much to the horror of Duggee and the other Squirrels - and the tiny citizens of Midgetropolis who live inside it!

programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels hop inside the Biology Bus and miniaturize themselves to go on a voyage of discovery inside Enid, to find out what's making her cough.

programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

But his efforts cause silt to churn up from the seabed, trapping Lars under the water. Will Xuli manage to get him free before his air runs out?

programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the magical wish granter Mango, ready to make all the Roots and Fruits cast wishes come true.

programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 30
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 5
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, a bit exasperated, he explains that he was miming. They want to know what miming is, and Duggee fondly recalls his days as a young Parisian street performer. The Squirrels are keen to learn how to mime, and Duggee runs them through the basics.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 4
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part. First, they need to find their talents. After they spend some time searching, Narrator explains that 'finding their talents' means working out what they are good at. So, the Squirrels practise their skills until they are ready to face an audience.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 26
programme.desc: Join the chickens in space for the big finale of Agony and Eggstacy! Mucho Suspense!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: Glitch transform's Sydney's iconic Opera House into an opera boat for a race around the Australian city's harbour.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: Bluey is running a taxi service. Her first passenger is Businessman Dad, who is in a rush to get to the airport. But with unexpected delays, Dad's in danger of missing his flight!

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 28
programme.desc: It is Bluey's first trip to the cinema, but she's worried that the movie will be too scary. When Bingo starts running amok in the theatre, she must conquer her fear and help Dad out.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 43
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 44
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: When Mr Hammond's animal photos from a trip to Rio de Janeiro are destroyed, Andy jets off in his safari-mobile, heading back to Brazil to take some new ones. Along the way, he takes to the skies with a burrowing owl and helps a young marmoset who's lost in the city to find his family. Will Andy get the photos he needs before Mr Hammond notices?

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have a snail slime race. But who will win, Team King or Team Queen?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 52
programme.desc: When Mole was young he wanted to be a Stunt Mole! Can Duggee and the squirrels help make his dreams come true? The first problem to fix is Mole's eyesight. Happy thinks he needs glasses, but Mole explains he can't wear them for stunts as they keep falling off his nose. Luckily Duggee has his Glasses Badge, so he has an idea how they can fix them.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 51
programme.desc: Duggee's uniform is a bit old and needs to be updated. Duggee can make his own clothes!! Over the years Duggee has made lots of clothes. The Squirrels are very impressed and help to make some new clothes and present them at their fashion show. But will their Winter, Fall, Spring, Summer Duggee Collection! be a success?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 50
programme.desc: Roly is digging in the garden when his spade suddenly hits something. It's a key. But what does it do? Duggee has his key badge, they can find out through trial and error. The squirrels go on an adventure to work out what the key opens and what could be inside. But what is Trial and Error? Duggee explains that sometimes things work and sometimes they don't.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 11
programme.desc: Hoping to follow in his great-aunt's footsteps, Glitch enlists the help of a sceptical Foz and a friendly yak in order to find a yeti in the Himalayas.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 10
programme.desc: Is Glitch stealing tulips from the Netherlands? That's what the Go Jetters think and they almost ruin the parade Glitch and Tala are making a huge tulip flower float for.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 1
programme.desc: Bulgy thinks that people should travel by bus instead of rail, that is until he tries carrying all their passengers.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 10
programme.desc: Duck has some competition for Sarah's attention when a brand new toy arrives.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 11
programme.desc: Scarf Lady takes Sarah and Duck on trip up the mountains. At the top of a mountain they find Poetry Pete reading a poem. When the day is nearly over, Scarf Lady suggests a fast way down the mountain.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 12
programme.desc: Stanley covers Jose at the shop and ends up making too much popcorn. So as not to waste it all, Stanley and his friends put on a film night to screen Little Woo's film.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 11
programme.desc: Cynthia asks Stanley to teach her to fly an aeroplane for Fifi's birthday. Stanley constructs a flight simulator and has the help of their friends to put her through her paces.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: The funny little animals talk us through all their favourite creatures.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S01 - EP 32
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran join Jaxon and Ezra in the park for Cynthia's pirate-themed treasure hunt. Who will be the first to find the treasure? Come on, shipmates, and set sail with JoJo and Gran Gran!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 26
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 27
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 28
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 27
programme.desc: The Squirrels have played all of their board games, so Duggee entertains them by putting on a Game Show, with some help hosting from his good friend Ladybug.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 26
programme.desc: Happy sets his sights on a very questionable looking puddle that he is determined to splash in, much to the horror of Duggee and the other Squirrels - and the tiny citizens of Midgetropolis who live inside it!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: Xuli, Lars and Glitch argue over whose vehicle is the best -€" the Vroomster, the Truckster or the Grimbler. Kyan suggests the only way to settle the argument is a race. A sudden waterspout helps Glitch take an early lead, but Ubercorn warns them about the much larger tornadic waterspouts that can sometimes appear. When the weather turns, Glitch and the Go Jetters find themselves in trouble. Can they get to safety before a huge tornado hits the island?

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S02 - EP 21
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's your favourite show host, Pak Choi, who might be known by many names, but sings about how she's "Always Pak To You!"

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S02 - EP 20
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the magical wish granter Mango, ready to make all the Roots and Fruits cast wishes come true.

programme.title: Supertato S02 - EP 25
programme.desc: Broccoli shows Supertato her latest art exhibition of jelly sculptures, but jelly is Supertato's secret fear. When Evil Pea finds out, she comes up with an evil idea to beat him.

programme.title: Supertato S02 - EP 26
programme.desc: When Evil Pea poses as a magician so that she can use tricks to make the Tato Team 'disappear', Supertato and Carrot create their own magical plan to rescue them.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 120
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa­Laa and Po receive a call on the Tubby Phone. It's the Tiddlytubbies who ring to say hello, just before the Tubby Phone Dance.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S05 - EP 14
programme.desc: Today, we see lots of grass - green grass, soft grass, spiky grass, growing grass and mowing grass. We see a pair of hairy grass heads, a group of groovy grasses and Dee finds some fairy grass.
