programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 20
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels have different ideas about what makes a good party. But the Squirrels have lots of ideas about what happens when the clock strikes twelve. Are they right?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 1
programme.desc: The Squirrels are admiring Duggee's crop of giant carrots when they hear a noise. They find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 2
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone they think is Enid, only much too big... Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid! Of course, the Squirrels want their faces painted too, so Duggee sets to it.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 3
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. No worries, the Squirrels can run after him and give it back. They take all sorts of transport to catch Rhodri, and he is always one step ahead. Until finally, they're on a raft across the sea and land right by Rhodri's front door.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 16
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 105
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa-Laa and Po enjoy Tiddlytubbies Songtime. Then it is time for Teletubbies Songtime. The Teletubbies sing solo before singing all together.

programme.title: Teletubbies Ready Steady Go! S01 - EP 9
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are back together like you've never seen them before!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 1
programme.desc: Dad is pretending to be an estate agent selling the Grannies' house to Mum, but Janet and Rita do not want to move out. They try to disrupt the sale by ambushing Mum in the hallway, driving their car through the kitchen and introducing Ghostbasket - a ghastly haunted washing basket.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 34
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 35
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 36
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 37
programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 11
programme.desc: Raul, the Brazilian tank engine, wants to beat Thomas in a game. But Raul's super-competitive nature soon gets him into trouble.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 12
programme.desc: When notorious Diesel hides from the other engines, his plans backfire and he gets a surprise on Sodor.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 13
programme.desc: Shane is having too much fun to stop and refuel. That is, until he runs out of coal and is stranded in the hot, red desert.

programme.title: Go Jetters S02 - EP 37
programme.desc: The Go Jetters travel to Kinderdijk in The Netherlands to celebrate National Mill Day.

programme.title: Go Jetters S02 - EP 38
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch is invited to Djenne in Mali, Africa, to visit the people and to see one of his favourite things at work - mud.

programme.title: Go Jetters S02 - EP 39
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit Wimbledon in England.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 11
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo are great at picking apples with Mojo's crane top. But Preston's drone might be even better... until it accidentally scoops up Felix. Mojo and Bo are on the chase!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 12
programme.desc: Bryan gets spooked and thinks there's a lake monster lurking in the mists. It'll be Mojo and Bo who have to find the monster... or show Bryan that there's no monster at all!

programme.title: Supertato S02 - EP 24
programme.desc: Evil Pea makes a monster costume in the craft aisle to scare the Tato Team out of the supermarket, but Supertato wants to be the monster's friend.

programme.title: Supertato S02 - EP 25
programme.desc: Broccoli shows Supertato her latest art exhibition of jelly sculptures, but jelly is Supertato's secret fear. When Evil Pea finds out, she comes up with an evil idea to beat him.

programme.title: Supertato S02 - EP 26
programme.desc: When Evil Pea poses as a magician so that she can use tricks to make the Tato Team 'disappear', Supertato and Carrot create their own magical plan to rescue them.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 11
programme.desc: Duggee is having a lovely cup of tea in his favourite cup when Roly surprises him with a very loud peek-a-boo! It is so loud that Duggee jumps and drops his cup which shatters into pieces.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 12
programme.desc: A box full of bits and pieces is delivered to the Clubhouse and the Squirrels are excited. Duggee and the Squirrels are going to have to work hard to put it all together. Time for a bit of teamwork.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 13
programme.desc: When a dancing bug lands on Duggee's head, he can't stop dancing. The Squirrels see that it's a tiny hillbilly bug with a fiddle. And what's more, he's got a band with him - the Hillbilly Bug Band.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 14
programme.desc: Duggee is playing with his train set. Choo-choo! It's amazing! The squirrels are curious and want to know all about it. Duggee explains that it is a toy but it works exactly like a real train. Hennie arrives and she has a train too. The squirrels ask if they can play with it. You can't play with it; you can play IN it says Hennie.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2) - EP 11
programme.desc: The team has a chance to finally solve the case of the USS Cyclops. Missing since 1918 with 309 sailors, this 500-foot freighter represents the single deadliest Bermuda Triangle loss.

programme.title: The Pickers (S26) - EP 389
programme.desc: Flying solo, Mike heads to the California castle home of the Great Razooly-a sculptor, entrepreneur, and horror icon whose collection includes monsters, gargoyles, and a rocket ship on the front lawn.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3) - EP 16
programme.desc: Today, human civilisation spans the globe, and there are more than 7 billion people on Earth. But how did humanity evolve? Were there other kinds of human-like creatures?

programme.title: Swamp People (S15) - EP 8
programme.desc: As gator season approaches the halfway point, Troy and Pickle hunt a haunted honeyhole with a checkered past. Bruce searches for the monster threatening a local swimming hole.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12) - EP 14
programme.desc: After months of tireless work and focused research, the massive excavation to recover the fabled Chappell Vault begins.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats Of WWII - EP 2
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Darrell Miklos' search for treasure-filled, lost Nazi U-Boats takes an unexpected turn when a 98-year-old local eyewitness gives him a tip that changes the course of his investigation.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It? - EP 5
programme.desc: An angry confrontation leads to a 31-year-old father facing life behind bars after shooting his ex-girlfriend's boyfriend in the leg. He insists he was defending his ex and their child from an intruder.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16) - EP 3
programme.desc: Terri is a woman of very few words. When she does speak, she is sincere and prideful. She is now retired from her successful careers as both an EMI of 40 years and a fire department EMT of 10 years.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16) - EP 4
programme.desc: Working through many traumatic events throughout her life, Terri has done her best to overcome and persevere. The one thing that dramatically suffered in the process was her home.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson - EP 4

programme.desc: When beloved matriarch Sherry Black, 64, is murdered in her rare books store in Salt Lake City, investigators suspect theft as the motive.

programme.desc: When a mystery woman's burning body is found in an oil field in 2006, the rural community of Kilgore and a determined Texas lawman show why you don't mess with the Lone Star State.

programme.title: Asia S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: Asia's jungles are exceptionally diverse, but whilst they provide shelter, food and opportunity, they are also full of dangers and hidden threats. In monsoon forests, tigers tenaciously hunt their prey, and prehistoric-looking rhinos play courtship games akin to kiss-chase. In tropical rainforests, female orangutans must search far and wide to find their perfect mates. And in the little-known forests of Iraqi Kurdistan, a new Persian leopard population is growing amid minefields.

programme.title: Asia S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: Asia's jungles are exceptionally diverse, but whilst they provide shelter, food and opportunity, they are also full of dangers and hidden threats. In monsoon forests, tigers tenaciously hunt their prey, and prehistoric-looking rhinos play courtship games akin to kiss-chase. In tropical rainforests, female orangutans must search far and wide to find their perfect mates. And in the little-known forests of Iraqi Kurdistan, a new Persian leopard population is growing amid minefields.

programme.title: The Persians - A History of Iran S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: In the last episode, Samira Ahmed travels to the crumbling ruins of an ancient walled city and goes back to when Persia faced her gravest threat: Genghis Khan. But from the death and destruction, emerged a golden age of Persian poetry and art.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Stanley visits Milan, the capital of Lombardy. He goes for aperitivo with a social media star and tries some of the Missoni family's favourite dishes: brasato, polenta and freshly foraged mushrooms.

programme.title: Michael Palin - Into Iraq S01 - EP 1

programme.title: Amanda and Alan's Italian Job S02 - EP 1
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr are packing their boiler suits once again after bagging another one-euro house - this time, in the idyllic region of northern Tuscany. Falling in love with the romance and history of an old building, Alan purchases a dilapidated 17th-century house with a medieval watchtower in the rural hamlet of Fornovolasco, and ropes in best friend Amanda to spend their summer transforming it into another Italian dream home.

programme.title: Amanda and Alan's Italian Job S02 - EP 2
programme.desc: Best pals Amanda and Alan take on their first major renovation project, transforming the old dining room into a Tuscan living room. Failing to reach agreement on the colour scheme, the two venture off to try and get some inspiration from the colourful fishing village of Riomaggiore. Colour choice becomes the least of their worries though, when they discover the windows of their 17th-century home are unsalvageable and must be made from scratch.

programme.title: Grand Designs S22 - EP 1
programme.desc: Zahid and Ferzana ambitiously set out to transform an old coastguard station on an exposed East Yorkshire headland into a cantilevered, three-storey steel and glass box.

programme.title: Jamie's Money Saving Meals S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Jamie elevates bargain veggies in an Indian-inspired dosa, makes a DIY crispy breadcrumbed chicken takeaway, creates an oozy barley risotto and finishes off with thrifty choc-orange shortbreads.

programme.title: Big Zuu & AJ Tracey's Rich Flavours S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Up in Bonnie Scotland, Zuu and AJ head to the luxury 'old money' estates of the rich and high society. programme.title: Halftime Report
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day.

programme.title: Halftime Report
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: U.S. Markets Edition - EP 88
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC’s programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: The Hospitals That Won't Let Patients Go Home
programme.desc: The International Finance Corp., an arm of the World Bank, spends millions of dollars of taxpayer money to build up private-sector services in the developing world.

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: Inside the Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With the West
programme.desc: This is the story of how two alleged murder plots involving Sikh activists brought India, the US and Canada to a diplomatic crisis.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: The Trading Guru and His Money-Losing Disciples
programme.desc: IM Academy was a global phenomenon, claiming it could make anyone a top trader. Its founder, Chris Terry, a self-made trader turned multimillionaire who flaunted luxury cars, private jets and apartments across continents.

programme.title: China's Controversial $167 Billion Mega-Dam
programme.desc: In one of the most earthquake-prone regions on Earth, where the Tibetan Plateau meets the Himalayas, China is building a colossal hydropower system, pushing engineering and geopolitics to the limit.

programme.title: Who Will Fill Jamie Dimon's Shoes?
programme.desc: With a $4.6 trillion balance sheet, JPMorgan is more valuable than its three biggest rivals combined. And much of the bank’s success is arguably due to its long-time leader, Jamie Dimon.

programme.title: The Rise of America's ICE Towns

programme.desc: The Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission is supposed to root out graft. Instead, some of its members have been accused of perpetuating the very wrongdoing they were meant to stop.

programme.title: Historical Drama "BROTHERS IN ARMS" Ep.21 (R)
programme.desc: Hideyoshi and Koichiro are assigned to secure the war-torn region of Harima, caught between the Oda and Mori forces, taking over from Araki Murashige (Tortoise Matsumoto). Though expected to be a difficult mission, they gain a powerful ally in Kodera Kanbei (Kura Yuki), the lord of Himeji Castle, who skillfully brings the local clans over to Oda’s side. Following Hanbei’s strategy, Hideyoshi pushes further west into Nishi-Harima.

programme.desc: The true classics of the century are born again! Classic songs are reinterpreted by the best idol groups in Korea! Don't miss this beautiful competition with heart-moving moments that transcend generations!

programme.title: Recipe for Love - EP 33
programme.desc: In the rapidly developing town of Onjeong, two rival medical families - one modern and one traditional - wage a neighbourhood feud fuelled by a long-standing grudge. This drama follows their chaotic journey as they unravel decades of misunderstanding to find healing and love.

programme.title: Cabbage Your Life - EP 6
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly find themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes and heartwarming moments.

programme.title: Dear.M - EP 6
programme.desc: A pure, no-filter youth romance drama unravelling a pink-hued mystery as the search goes on for 'M', the protagonist behind the love letter that turned Seoyeon University upside down.

programme.title: My Neighbor, Charles - EP 529
programme.desc: Foreigners, leaving their homelands behind, have come all the way to a new country, South Korea, for reasons such as work, study or even marriage. The real stories of foreigners who challenge themselves to survive in Korean society are unfolded!

programme.desc: The program invites doctors from different fields to talk about big and small things about doctors, break the stereotype of doctors and provide audiences with information on medical health from a relaxed and pleasant perspective!

programme.desc: A trip without a purpose, just go on a whim, so simple, are you willing to join us? A journey that witnesses the friendship of men begins!Let's go! Bring a simple bag, ride a hot-blooded motorcycle, and have fun traveling and charging.

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk - EP 511
programme.desc: Hosted by Dee Hsu, the most queenly artist in the entertainment industry, and partnered with the humorous assistant host Patrick, each episode invites many of the most popular and topical artists and Internet celebrities to appear on the show. programme.title: Blue Moment - EP 2
programme.desc: This gripping drama centers on the looming threats of massive meteorological disasters and their impact on human lives. It follows the unwavering dedication of a Special Disaster Management team who armed with expertise and courage, risk everything on the front lines to save lives.

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 30
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2226
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 9
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] On the pretext of recovering gambling debts from Lam Yiu, Hok-lai and Yau-wai conspire to douse Lam Ching with red paint. As the matter gets out of hand, the Fongs are shocked to realize Lam Ching has a convicted elder brother called Lam Yiu. Lam Ching is under pressure due to her family members’ sarcasm and accusations, so she writes a letter to Yeung-tin to explain her need to reconsider their marriage.

programme.title: Strange Tales of Tang Dynasty III to Changan - EP 6
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Amid Chang'an's power shifts, Lu Lingfeng and Su Wuming lead their detective team back to the capital, turning a teahouse into a covert base. They tackle bizarre cases from haunted temples to court plots, culminating in a polo match that tests their fates.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2226
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Treasures Around - EP 14
programme.desc: The quirky and clever Shan Dandan (Xu Lu), who dreams of becoming a jade appraiser, crosses paths with Pei Pei (Bi Wen Jun), the wayward heir to a jade business. Initially at odds, the two develop a love-hate relationship as they face challenges together.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 6
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Yeung-tin and Wun-chau’s past is exposed. Wun-chau offers some explanation to Lam Ching, and the duo resolve their misunderstanding. Hok-kan pays Lam Ching’s father Lam Tat-kuen a visit and expresses goodwill to him. But he accidentally finds out Tat-kuen has no knowledge of the marriage.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 7
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Ko Sham goes about investigating the family charity foundation overseen by Sin-chuen. He finds out there are probably certain corrupt activities between the foundation and some children’s home. Sin-chuen uses resignation as a threat to force Yeung-tin to terminate the investigation.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 8
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Chi-kwan clashes with some internet celebrity KOL in the street. Ko Sham, who is handling the incident, isn’t kind to her. On the day of the briefing, Ka-yan spikes Lam Ching’s coffee with sleeping pills, causing Lam Ching to miss the event.

programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Three lifelong friends turned elite lawyers work at a firm defending female crime victims. Their unshakeable bond is tested when a buried 20-year secret resurfaces amid explosive cases.

programme.title: Your Honor - EP 8
programme.desc: Lee Cheong-gang testifies against Kim Sang-hyuk in court. Pan-ho meets Gang-heon in an attempt to lure him into a trap, but the conversation takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Double Happiness - EP 4
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Xu Kai Xin (Zhang Yu Qi), single mother of two, and Mei Cheng Yi (Han Geng), a single father of two, as they navigate the chaos of parenting four kids, growing closer through life’s unpredictable twists.

programme.title: Double Happiness - EP 5
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Xu Kai Xin (Zhang Yu Qi), single mother of two, and Mei Cheng Yi (Han Geng), a single father of two, as they navigate the chaos of parenting four kids, growing closer through life’s unpredictable twists.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 17
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 18
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: Double Happiness - EP 6
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Xu Kai Xin (Zhang Yu Qi), single mother of two, and Mei Cheng Yi (Han Geng), a single father of two, as they navigate the chaos of parenting four kids, growing closer through life’s unpredictable twists.

programme.title: Double Happiness - EP 7
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Xu Kai Xin (Zhang Yu Qi), single mother of two, and Mei Cheng Yi (Han Geng), a single father of two, as they navigate the chaos of parenting four kids, growing closer through life’s unpredictable twists.

programme.title: Honour - EP 12
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Three lifelong friends turned elite lawyers work at a firm defending female crime victims. Their unshakeable bond is tested when a buried 20-year secret resurfaces amid explosive cases.

programme.title: Your Honor - EP 9
programme.desc: Gang-heon visits Sang-hyuk at the detention center, ordering him to leave the country immediately after his release. Pan-ho receives word that Ho-young is trying to get a gun

programme.title: Country Spirit - EP 6
programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse._x000D__x000D_ LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead. _x000D__x000D_ LUNG’s only son, SAN (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) serves in the army. The family has not heard from him for a long time and assumes that he is dead.

programme.title: The Driving Power - EP 2
programme.desc: MUI (CHENG SIU CHOW, ADAM) is a middle-aged man who has never had a proper job. Throughout his life, he has been relying on his family and living like a playboy. His biggest achievements are marrying a singer, YUNG (YIP TUNG, CECILIA) and raising their daughter CHU (YE MICHELLE). MUI and YUNG love each other very much even after being married for more than 20 years. However, deep down, MUI is still a playboy._x000D__x000D_ MUI’s uncle asks him to take care of his nightclub, which delights him.

programme.title: Treasure of Destiny - EP 14
programme.desc: Pork butcher stall lady boss Chu Ying-kiu (Katy Kung) has innate mystical power. But she is inflicted with some strange illness that causes her to grow a beard. She hopes to find the elixir mentioned in Sutra of Forty-two Chapters for treating her illness. Over the years, university Chinese language professor Cheung King (Moses Chan) has been passionate about finding this legendary treasure. However, he has been suffering from insomnia as he was devastated in an incident.

programme.title: Legend Of Demigods - EP 17
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 11
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 12

programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. programme.title: ONE GOOD TURN DESERVES ANOTHER - EP 11
programme.desc: Young and beautiful Yee (Maggie Cheung) was held responsible for murdering a millionaire for his estate. She employed Shek (Chan Kai Tai) to defend for her. Shek was attracted to her mysterious background and fell for her seduction._x000D__x000D_It turned out that Yee was in fact the step-sister of Shek’s wife Shan (So Yuk Wah). She blamed Shan’s mother for taking her father away and she swore to take revenge. She seduced Shek and made him divorce Shan.

programme.title: Colourful Life - EP 15
programme.desc: The CHENG family has been running a business in the dyeing industry for several generations. Master CHENG and his wife died early. His mistress, SHUI KWUN DING FUNG (TSUI SUJK YEE), has since been running the business and keeps the family in shape._x000D__x000D_The eldest son, CHI SHING (LAW MONG), is a simple and straightforward person. He has a good and helpful wife, CHOW MONA (SO YUK WAH, LOUISA). The second son, CHI POK (YUEN SIU CHEUNG, LOUIS), is a short-tempered man.

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 20
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. AI company employee Koo Ka-lim (6 Wing) thinks he has found some treasure and arbitrarily keeps Bo for himself. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 21
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. AI company employee Koo Ka-lim (6 Wing) thinks he has found some treasure and arbitrarily keeps Bo for himself. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.

programme.title: Wonder Women - EP 1
programme.desc: LAM FEI (Miriam Yeung) is a beautiful, trendy yet cheerful "Wonder Women" housewife. She and her husband, an architect SHEUNG KIM-HUNG (Raymond Wong) and a smart and active son SHEUNG KAI-KAI are living a happy life. LAM FEI has two buddies, a career woman, MAN FUNG-WAH (Alice Chan) and a pretty and wealthy wife MA SEE-LUI (Rebecca Zhu). Each of this trio has her own ideas about romance and encounter different up and down of love. KIM-HUNG develops his career.

programme.title: Wonder Women - EP 2
programme.desc: LAM FEI (Miriam Yeung) is a beautiful, trendy yet cheerful "Wonder Women" housewife. She and her husband, an architect SHEUNG KIM-HUNG (Raymond Wong) and a smart and active son SHEUNG KAI-KAI are living a happy life. LAM FEI has two buddies, a career woman, MAN FUNG-WAH (Alice Chan) and a pretty and wealthy wife MA SEE-LUI (Rebecca Zhu). Each of this trio has her own ideas about romance and encounter different up and down of love. KIM-HUNG develops his career.

programme.title: Sex Beyond The Grave
programme.desc: During World War II, a singer was raped and killed by Master Tao during her escape, with all her valuables stolen as well. Since then, the Tao's house became haunted. Years later, Master Tao's descendant sells the house to a young couple to pay off a massive gambling debt, but the couple soon discover that it is haunted by the vengeful spirit...

programme.title: How to Choose a Royal Bride
programme.desc: The Empress Dowager has arranged for a Minister's daughter Qiong Yao, to become Emperor Kangxi's concubine. However, Qiong Yao escapes in pursuit of freedom in marriage and Kangxi is happy to not go through with the union. When Kangxi travels incognito to Jiangnan, he serendipitously encounters Qiong Yao, who disguises herself as a man...

programme.title: Painted Face
programme.desc: Scholar Wang Huai Qing sells paintings to save his ailing wife. He is attacked by a bird demon along the way but is rescued by Fox demon Xiao Rong. To elude the pursuit, Wang brings Xiao Rong home, sparking a love triangle and at the same time, unfolding an impending love between human and demon.

programme.title: Punish Evil
programme.desc: A shipment of newly issued currency is robbed by three armed robbers, prompting Detective Chang to investigate. Following new leads, he successfully takes down one of the robbers. Meanwhile, the other two plot to rob a gold factory amidst the chaos. With meticulous planning, Chang thwarts their scheme and brings them to justice.

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Model Min is admitted to a hospital, but mysteriously falls to her death at night. Rumour has it that the hospital is haunted. Subsequently, Min's photographer begins receiving eerie phone calls, the writer loses consciousness in a bizarre car accident, and her friend mysteriously disappears...

programme.title: Casino Tycoon
programme.desc: Inspired by the story of Macau's Casino King Stanley Ho, the movie traces his blood-splattered fight to the top from 1930s to 1960s. In 1941, a young graduate, Benny Ho, flees Hong Kong during the Japanese invasion and heads for Macau. Benny starts as a labourer but rises to the top of the city's casino business with his courage, wisdom and diligence.

programme.title: Perfect Girls
programme.desc: Chi will inherit his dying grandfather's fortune with one condition - he has to be married in a month, otherwise the money goes to his uncle, Robert. Chi falls in love with Siu Siu, but Robert intends to stop them by sending Moraine to seduce Chi. When Moraine decides to marry Chi for money, Robert stops her and reveals their plot.

programme.title: Fist of Legend
programme.desc: When Chen Zhen studies in Japan, he finds several Chinese students missing and accidentally uncovers the Black Dragon Society's conspiracy. A new drug is invented to boost bodies of the Japanese troops in war and the Chinese students are used in their experiments. Chen Zhen vows to take down the evil society and destroy their secret laboratory.

programme.title: Mr Vampire Saga 4
programme.desc: A Buddhist monk and Taoist priest put aside their differences to take on vampires that have been struck by lightning and have now become a super powered threat to mankind.

programme.title: Final Justice (1988)
programme.desc: Chang is a brilliant police inspector, but his maverick ways have put him at odds with both his superiors and peers. When he encounters Wai, a streetwise car thief who accidentally becomes the key to tracking down a gang of armed bank robbers, the two form an uneasy alliance to bring the criminals to justice.

programme.title: Law Or Justice
programme.desc: Lawyer Yip defends a rapist and gets him acquitted. Yip's boyfriend Fong, a police inspector, knows he is guilty and despises Yip for not upholding justice. The victim's sister takes revenge by spiking the rapist's drink but is raped instead. This puts the rapist back in court. Will Yip choose to uphold law or justice this time?

programme.title: Munitions Hijacking Case
programme.desc: Agent Wen is assigned to work undercover for a Southeast Asian arms dealer to locate and destroy a cache of munitions. However, when he finally finds them, he is attacked by unknown gangsters and must team up with his partner to recover the weapons and prevent a disaster.

programme.title: Justice, My Foot!
programme.desc: Stephen Chow plays Sung, a lawyer who uses any means necessary to help his wealthy clients escape the law. Sung retires to the countryside when urged by his wife, but when Mrs Sung encounters a woman whose husband's death has been covered up by corrupted officials, Sung returns to the court for justice to be served.

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: Ma Wing Jing and his brother arrive in Shanghai to make their fortune. Befriending a powerful mobster Tam, Ma is given his nightclub when he saves Tam's life. Ma's fortune rises but he must overcome the corruption and violence to survive.

programme.title: Behind the Yellow Line
programme.desc: A fresh graduate, Paul, strikes up an acquaintance with a pretty young girl, Monica, on the metro. Monica is involved in a love affair with a married man while Paul is also pursued by a rich girl. When Paul vows his true love for Monica, she suggests playing hide-and-seek with him in the metro to decide if they are fated to be together.

programme.title: Mahjong Heroes
programme.desc: A hero helps a young student deflect a cunning and malicious gambling tycoon who is out to take over the student's family business over a game of mahjong.

programme.title: The Case of Disappearances
programme.desc: In Misty Village, the adopted son Wen Jie is haunted by a recurring nightmare. He delves into a series of disappearance cases in the village to seek his true identity. As more villagers die mysteriously, belief in the curse of Emperor Jing Lung intensifies. Wen Jie teams up with the security chief to unveil the conspiracy and protect the villagers.

programme.title: Nezha
programme.desc: A former top team racing driver wants to prove himself in a race but accidentally hurts his teammate Lily, leading to the team's downfall. When an inexperienced virtual car racing champion joins the team and unexpectedly shines in a real-life race, can the three drivers team up to regain glory for their team?

programme.title: The Magnificent Scoundrels
programme.desc: Conman Sing is forced by a loan shark to team up with another con artist Betty to steal from a luxurious house. When they encounter other conmen who disguise themselves as the house owners to steal the antiques, they pretend to be their rich guests. As both sides know the other's true identity, they join forces to con the loan shark into a trap.

programme.title: The Macaque Monkey
programme.desc: The world is in chaos after the tree of life was burnt. Sun Wu Kong decides to return to the past to resurrect it, but his divine power is unstable after losing the golden hoop, and he must find his younger self to team up to find the power of time. As the six-eared Macaque Monkey also wants the power of time, they clash in a fierce battle...

programme.title: Whisper of Silent Body
programme.desc: Renowned as the "corpse whisperer," forensic pathologist Qin Ming uncovers vital clues from the corpses. During a homicide investigation, he unravels a murder case sixteen years ago in the snowy mountain with his assistant and a detective. Together, they unveil the secrets of the mysterious homicide.

programme.title: VR Fighter
programme.desc: Bodyguard Long Wei has post‐traumatic stress disorder after his wife's death. One day, he encounters Amy who works for a VR technology firm and is invited for a new product test. After the test, Long Wei becomes the firm's VR fighter and dons the newly invented armour. However, as mysterious armed men break in, a fierce battle has just begun...

programme.title: I Love Lolanto
programme.desc: Lolanto, a playboy, is injured and meets the daughter of a tycoon, Man, in the hospital. Man is mentally retarded and makes friends easily with Lolanto hence Man's father hires him to take care of her. However, as Man goes through treatments and recovers, her feelings for Lolanto also changes...

programme.title: The Gangster, the Cop, the Devil
programme.desc: The movie is adapted from real events. Detective Lin sets up a special unit to arrest the motorbike robber and the crime syndicate behind the thefts in Foshan. In the process, his pregnant wife is hit by a motorbike robber, leading him to uncover their revenge plan...

programme.title: When Fortune Smiles
programme.desc: A rich man dies, leaving all his fortune to his daughter in his will, but his son and nephew want a piece of the pie. The nephew sends Vincent to steal the will and the son finds Fung, who looks like his sister, to get the will. Vincent plans to marry Fung for the fortune, but as the two fall in love, they decide to unveil the cunning schemes.

programme.title: Kungfu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Hong Kong action cinema is famous for its real kung fu moves performed by a group called "Kung Fu Stuntmen". This docu-film pays tribute to the generations of kung fu stuntmen, with the crew spending over two years digging archives and interviewing many talents, including the most prominent masters like Jackie Chan, Donnie Yen and Sammo Hung.

programme.title: Look Out, Officer!
programme.desc: Stephen Chow is a delight in this supernatural action comedy, where a murdered police officer returns from beyond the grave to persuade a rookie cop into avenging his death.

programme.title: Iceman
programme.desc: Falsely accused of murder, Ming Dynasty Imperial Guard Ying is pursued by his three sworn brothers until a fierce battle leaves all four entombed in ice. Four hundred years later, they awaken in modern Hong Kong, where they must reignite their ancient feud in a world they can barely recognise.

programme.title: The Mad Monk
programme.desc: Stephen Chow plays an arrogant god in Heaven who is being punished for his pranks and mistakes. He is sent to Earth and reincarnate as Mad Monk to change the destiny of three misguided souls - a prostitute, a beggar and a villain. The Mad Monk needs to complete the task in three days in order to return to Heaven.

programme.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
programme.desc: The legendary swordsman Li, entrusts the Green Destiny sword to a noble house for safekeeping. It is swiftly stolen by Yu, a young aristocrat of immense martial skills trained by an unscrupulous outlaw master. Recognising her talent, Li tries to guide her towards righteousness but ultimately leads them both to a tragic fate.

programme.title: Turns We Take
programme.desc: A spicy hot pot restaurant in Northeast China serves different types of customers every day. Amongst them are a sweet young couple, two wayward young men and a taxi driver. Despite being complete strangers to each other, their lives are intertwined by a traffic accident...

programme.title: Forbidden Tales of Two Cities
programme.desc: Li Han-hsiang wrote and directed this charming and fascinating comedy, Forbidden Tales Of Two Cities. The two cities in the picture are Macau, where a love quartet is a morally-unsound source for sexual entertainment; and Hong Kong, where a woman enters a gambler's apartment to find four shackles hanging from his ceiling to aid in kinky activities.

programme.title: My Rebellious Son
programme.desc: A corrupt official attempts to steal a priceless Buddha statue from a temple to please a group of Westerners. Luckily, Doctor Zhang and his son manage to defeat the Western boxers, the Japanese Kendo opponents and the Western longsword fighters with Chinese kung fu, thus saving the Buddha statue.

programme.title: Tragic Commitment
programme.desc: When the husband of a doctor, Tung is fatally wounded in an accident, he reveals to her about his affair with Blackie, who is impregnated with his baby. Despite the devastation of the betrayal and the eventual death of her husband, Tung is pressured by her mother-in-law into putting up with Blackie and offer $1M for her baby...

programme.title: Five Elements Ninjas
programme.desc: The film is about a Chinese martial arts school finds itself outclassed by their rivals, they hire elite ninja from Japan to destroy the school. The lone survivor of the massacre learns the secrets of ninjutsu and seeks revenge against the ninja.

programme.title: The Jade Faced Assassin
programme.desc: Two forbidden lovers, Zhang Zhen and Yue Nu, are killed by four villains and left behind their twin babies. Yue Nu's elder sister hopes to restore the clan's honour and separates the twins, arranging for them to be raised by competing clans. 18 years later, the twins meet and fight against each other, bringing chaos to the martial arts world.

programme.title: The Happy Trio
programme.desc: Ah Chiao, a village girl stranded in the city, befriends a kind-hearted tramp and a retired actor. They are poor but happy, though Ah Chiao's fortune change for the better when she becomes a singer. However, she soon learns that money cannot buy one happiness...

programme.title: Dirty Ho
programme.desc: Master Wang, who is actually the 11th prince, poses as an antique connoisseur to hide his true identity. When he meets Dirty Ho, a witty con artist, Wang knows he has found the right man to help him untangle a royal succession plot...

programme.title: Love without End
programme.desc: Singer Qing Qing and architect Peng Nan are a devoted couple. Qing Qing sacrifices herself to help Peng Nan when his family is going through difficulties and is misunderstood by Peng Nan, leading to their break up. When Peng Nan learns the truth and decides to make up with Qing Qing, he finds out that she is suffering from a terminal illness.

programme.title: Pursuit of a Killer
programme.desc: The charm of Pursuit Of A Killer lies in the long awaited reunion of Five Venoms duo, Lo Meng and Sun Chien; Lo Meng, who plays a Mainland Chinese criminal escapee to Hong Kong in search of a better life, and a cop (Sun Chien) who helps him adjust to Hong Kong life while tracking down his mysterious killer at the same time.

programme.title: Beyond the Great Wall
programme.desc: Wang Zhao Jun refuses to bribe the imperial painter, so he draws an ugly portrait of her, preventing her from being selected by the Emperor until they meet in person. The painter ends up in exile and plots for Wang to marry the Hun's warlord as a revenge. The Emperor rejects this, provoking a war which is only averted when Wang sacrifices herself.

programme.title: Swordsman at Large
programme.desc: Hsiao Shi Yi Lang is the Swordsman at large who everyone wants to kill. A magnificient sword is even created for this purpose though the blade is soon coveted more than the swordsman's death by it! Bandits, beauties and blade masters battle for survival in this exciting story of deceit, betrayal, and death.

programme.title: Inside The Forbidden City
programme.desc: Justice Bao discovers that Consort Li's new born son was swapped at birth and that she was expelled from the palace by Empress Liu twenty years ago. He sets Eunuch Guo up to confess his conspiracy with the Empress. Empress Liu is convicted for her act and Consort Li finally reunites with her son who is now the Emperor.

programme.title: The Deadly Breaking Sword
programme.desc: Warrior Tuan Chang Qing meets courtesan Liu Yin Xi in a small town. Liu pleads Tuan to kill the underworld master Guo Tian Sheng, known as the "Killer Doctor", in order to avenge the death of her fiance. Tuan and gambling addict Xiao Dao breaks into Guo's household, triggering the battle of good against evil.

programme.title: The Younger Generation
programme.desc: A tragic tale about a young girl who gets married and has five kids. When she and her husband die, leaving all five kids behind to fend for themselves, the eldest child is forced to be sold into prostitution to feed the other four.

programme.title: The Fighting Fool
programme.desc: Famous Kung Fu Pole master Red Eagle, is kidnapped by a villain one day. His disciple Meng, vows to rescue him. On his way, Meng encounters a greedy but great martial artist who agrees to join him in the rescue. Even though the two have extremely different personalities, they manage to team up and fight the villain in a final showdown.

programme.title: Raw Passions
programme.desc: Mrs Lin's husband and his friend both have affairs with a belly dancer Sasa, and are both blackmailed by her. Sasa is stabbed one day and her brother shows up asking for money. A mysterious man also claims he can offer evidence for cash to help Lin's husband. Lin has to unveil the deceit, double-crosses and blackmailing before she is in danger too!

programme.title: The Shepherd Girl
programme.desc: In this musical drama, Hsiu Hsiu, a beautiful shepherd girl, falls in love with a handsome boatman Ta Lung. However, she cannot afford to marry him because of her father's towering debt from gambling. To complicate the matter, a rival suitor promises to pay off all her father's debts on one condition: that Hsiu Hsiu marries him...

programme.title: Puppy Love
programme.desc: To the tune of the Osmonds hit song, this is a story of adolescent playfulness & innocence lost. Two best friends grow up together and teasingly meet two delightfully impish boys leading to the four to flirtatiously intermingle. However, the innocence of partner swapping eventually leads to a roller-coaster bouts of misunderstood emotions.

programme.title: Scandal
programme.desc: The roguish scamp Zhen and his best friend Chia collects proof of corruption from the officials in this comedy-drama. After a string of blackmailing, they end up in positions of power, but what is to happen next?

programme.title: The Dragon Missile
programme.desc: Sima works for a corrupt lord Qin who is suffering from a deadly disease that only a special herb can cure. Qin sends him on an urgent mission to retrieve it, but the task is made more difficult when Sima has to fight off other martial artists who want to steal the cure away from him. He has to fight with his ultimate weapon, the Dragon Missile!

programme.title: Young Lovers
programme.desc: Guitar-playing rich kid, Yang Fan, heads to Japan to join a rock 'n' roll band where he soon finds himself competing for the affections of two beautiful girls.

programme.title: The Master
programme.desc: Gao Jian is the disciple of the martial arts master Shi but is constantly being punished by his master for no reason. One day, Gao accidentally saves his master's rival Jin, so Jin teaches him his unique martial arts skill in return. However, Master Shi sees this as Gao's betrayal…

programme.title: The Land of Many Perfumes
programme.desc: Monk Tang San Zang, Monkey, Pigsy and Sha Wu Jing find themselves in Womanland, where women only give birth to baby girls and do so by drinking the magical spring water.

programme.title: That Man In Chang-an
programme.desc: The Han Emperor dies and his Empress Lu seizes the ruling power. She plots to kill the heir to the throne, Liu Heng, but the masked warrior discovers her plot and tips off Liu. Liu sends his princess to Chang An to ask for help. The masked warrior protects the princess from attackers along the way and supports Liu to become the new Emperor.

programme.title: The Dream of the Red Chamber
programme.desc: Adapted from the most widely read and filmed novel in Chinese history, this version is said to be the most successful one. Betty Loh's looks, demeanour and aura in her portrayal of Lin Dai Yu has won her the epithet "Classic Beauty".

programme.title: The Singing Killer
programme.desc: Chiang Yi is blackmailed into a jewellery heist by his former boss who threatens to expose his shady past. Complications arise when Chiang Yi discovers his first love working in the jewellery store.

programme.title: Tiger Killer
programme.desc: Wu Song is appointed as chief constable after killing a tiger with his bare hands when drunk. The wife of his brother Wu Da Lang, seduces Wu Song but gets rejected by him, and engages in an affair with a rich man. They poison Wu Da Lang when he finds out about their affair. To avenge his brother's death, Wu Song kills both of them.

programme.title: Killer Constable
programme.desc: Kuei Chih-hung was famous for his modern day crime thrillers, his horror flicks, and even his comedies. But if the only kung-fu film he ever made was this one, he'd still be spoken of with respect by even the most ardent martial arts movie fan. Many consider this real life martial arts champion Chen Kuan-tai's best performance. As a deeply, even obsessively, dedicated Chief Court Constable, he illuminates the screen with fighting skill and emotional passion.

programme.title: Shao Kang's War Room
programme.desc: Shao Kang's War Room is a Talkshow hosted by Zhao Shao Kang. This programme combines TVBS News source and Mr. Zhao's rich political and media background, to analyse important news deeply.

programme.title: Global Golden Line
programme.desc: It is the first professional reality car show, providing concrete evaluations of cars on the market, the deepest appreciation for classic cars, the hottest trends in the motoring world, and analysis of the latest auto tech trends.

programme.title: Chop Chop Show
programme.desc: The show invites younger generations to talk about relationship, career, entertainment, current affairs, and all the other popular topics that they care and complain about.

programme.title: Citizens' Subjects
programme.desc: Citizens' Subjects utilizes the perspective of Taiwan people and Taiwan events to tell the stories of Taiwan. It takes a light-hearted, humorous approach to interpreting current affairs.

programme.title: Queen
programme.desc: From makeup, skincare, hairstyle, clothing, horoscopes, parenting, to travel, all kinds of fashion-related topics are presented in the program. Pauline Lan leads dozens of professionals and experts across categories to offer the best fashion insights and tips.

programme.title: Global Focus
programme.desc: Bringing you the latest political, economy, information technology and breaking news around the world.

programme.title: All About Health
programme.desc: How well do you know your body? What should you eat to be healthy and energetic? Are health tips available online reliable? Tune in to this programme as the hosts give you all the answers!

programme.title: Battle ATM
programme.desc: Creating a brand-new interactive ATM that combined with puzzle solving and daily life! Guests can win money by taking three rounds of intellectual challenges from the ATM, turn wisdom into money!_x000D_Futuristic program scenes with video game clearing concept, where challengers engage in the intellectual competition to switch on the ATM. Those who won goes to the ultimate challenge.

programme.title: Hu's Travel Agency
programme.desc: Hu's Travel Agency features TV host Hu Gua with his children Hsiao-Chen and Hu Shih-An, running Taiwan's "most human-centered travel agency." Centered in Miaoli, they blend family bonds and local culture to create heartfelt journeys.

programme.title: Discover New Taiwan Step By Step
programme.desc: The creative production team goes around Taiwan in search of inspiring stories in the country. Get to know more unique individuals and discover the true spirit of Taiwan.

programme.desc: Hosted by Sam Tseng and Hsu Nai Lin, this top Taiwan variety show, splits celebrity guests into two teams to battle in various game segments.

programme.title: TVBS Sisy's World News
programme.desc: Stay with Host Sisy Chen and the experts for the latest in global news, financial updates and current political events.

programme.title: TVBS Sisy's World News Europe
programme.desc: Stay with Host Sisy Chen and the experts for the latest in global news, financial updates and current political events.

programme.title: Super Taste:Family On The Road
programme.desc: A three-generation family travels and explores local cuisine together. Through differing perspectives and shared experiences, they connect across generations with food, fun, and everyday moments.

programme.title: Love Endures - EP 4
programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

programme.title: Singer 2026 - EP 2
programme.desc: Live. Raw. Real. Week after week, every Singer bares their soul on stage. No tricks. Just voice. Just heart. Just greatness. Let's witness.

programme.title: As Beautiful As You - EP 15
programme.desc: Ji Xing (Tan Song Yun), refuses to endure the stifling corporate grind, she quits her job to embark on a challenging entrepreneurial journey and eventually secures the investment of Han Ting (Xu Kai). Together, they advance in the medical and health industry.

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go - EP 220
programme.desc: This large-scale variety show gathers showbiz entertainers to challenge each other in various hilarious educational games. Viewers at home are also encouraged to get in on the fun and try out the games with friends in real life!

programme.title: Love Endures - EP 5
programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

programme.title: Woori The Virgin - EP 9
programme.desc: Oh Woo-ri has vowed to remain a virgin until she marries and has avoided romantic relationships to maintain her chastity. However, during a routine medical exam, a terrible mix-up occurs, resulting in accidental artificial insemination.

programme.title: Billionaire Story - EP 465
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: Singer 2026 - EP 2
programme.desc: Live. Raw. Real. Week after week, every Singer bares their soul on stage. No tricks. Just voice. Just heart. Just greatness. Let's witness.

programme.title: Lost You Forever Season 1 - EP 30
programme.desc: Wandering in Dahuang, Xiao Yao loses her identity and settles in Qingshui Town as Wen Xiao Liu. She meets Prince Qiang Xuan, Tu Shan Jing, Xiang Liu, A Nian, Chi Shui Feng Long and gets intertwined in a story of kinship, love, and friendship.

programme.title: Kids' Lives Matter - EP 24
programme.desc: The story started 21 years ago where one surgery broke the relationship between pediatric surgeons Dr. Jonathan Hui (Kelvin Cheng) and Dr. Amos Fong (Kenneth Ma). They part ways after but were reunited in Princess Anne Hospital due to a special transplant surgery.

programme.title: Woori The Virgin - EP 9
programme.desc: Oh Woo-ri has vowed to remain a virgin until she marries and has avoided romantic relationships to maintain her chastity. However, during a routine medical exam, a terrible mix-up occurs, resulting in accidental artificial insemination.

programme.title: Infinity and Beyond 3 - EP 5
programme.desc: Embark on a musical journey with 12 exceptional singers, exploring the cultural history of the past century. The show introduces themed competitions between two teams, creating a harmonious exploration of cultural evolution through popular music.

programme.title: Kids' Lives Matter - EP 25
programme.desc: The story started 21 years ago where one surgery broke the relationship between pediatric surgeons Dr. Jonathan Hui (Kelvin Cheng) and Dr. Amos Fong (Kenneth Ma). They part ways after but were reunited in Princess Anne Hospital due to a special transplant surgery.

programme.title: Billionaire Story - EP 466
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: Lost You Forever Season 1 - EP 31
programme.desc: Wandering in Dahuang, Xiao Yao loses her identity and settles in Qingshui Town as Wen Xiao Liu. She meets Prince Qiang Xuan, Tu Shan Jing, Xiang Liu, A Nian, Chi Shui Feng Long and gets intertwined in a story of kinship, love, and friendship.

programme.title: Singer 2026 - EP 3
programme.desc: Live. Raw. Real. Week after week, every Singer bares their soul on stage. No tricks. Just voice. Just heart. Just greatness. Let's witness.

programme.title: Go Where Flavours of Hunan Abound - EP 13
programme.desc: Wang Han, along with Shen Mengchen and Zoelly Wu, explores Hunan's diverse culinary landscape, showcasing 14 cities' unique flavors and soulful local stories.

programme.title: Lost You Forever Season 1 - EP 31
programme.desc: Wandering in Dahuang, Xiao Yao loses her identity and settles in Qingshui Town as Wen Xiao Liu. She meets Prince Qiang Xuan, Tu Shan Jing, Xiang Liu, A Nian, Chi Shui Feng Long and gets intertwined in a story of kinship, love, and friendship.

programme.title: James’ Going Places - EP 89
programme.desc: Join James, the host with outstanding culinary skills and an appetite for good food, as he explores markets and savours local delicacies in Taiwan!

programme.title: Mr Player - EP 96
programme.desc: Get ready for some serious fun with one of Taiwan's most popular outdoor variety shows! Golden Bell Award-winning hosts Jacky Wu and KID travel all over Taiwan and other parts of the world alongside celebrity guests to compete in races and complete missions.

programme.title: Hot Door Night - EP 163
programme.desc: Catch all the fun and laughter right here as we bring you Taiwan's top-grossing variety entertainment show that will keep you wanting for more!

programme.title: Special Flavor - EP 4
programme.desc: A former lawyer wok-fries pungent rice noodles. A Malaysian wife cooks Nyonya curry. Turkish brothers grill kebabs. Migrants, flavors, stories, all on the move.

programme.title: Perfect Match - EP 79
programme.desc: Perfect Match is a highly-rated large-scale dating variety show that connects eligible bachelors to bachelorettes in China. Be thoroughly entertained by the sharp and witty Meng Fei, one of the top hosts for shows of this genre, as he presents a unique and humorous approach to interactions between all the participants.

programme.title: I Love You, To the Moon, And Back
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Newlyweds Lin Xiushan and Wang Rui, forced to stay away from each other due to work, seize a holiday for a train journey. They meet diverse passengers and discover love's true meaning before night falls, yearning to make their dreams come true.

programme.title: Hello, Saturday - EP 104
programme.desc: Helmed by the ever-popular veteran show host He Jiong, this all-new variety show features celebrity artistes from China, Hong Kong and Taiwan participating in song and dance performances, games and more.

programme.title: The Inn 4 - EP 12
programme.desc: Escape to a seaside inn where life slows down and joy takes over. Watch friends run a charming getaway, uncover surprises, and share heartfelt moments in a journey about companionship, healing, and the beauty of living well.

programme.title: The Legend of Zhuohua - EP 31
programme.desc: Mu Zhuo Hua (Jing Tian), the illegitimate daughter of the richest man in Jiangnan, is determined to pass the civil service exam. She meets a poorly reputable general named Liu Yan (Feng Shao Feng) and forms an uneasy alliance, which eventually deepens into a closer bond.

programme.title: Lung Crisis: Health Alert
programme.desc: Rising cases of lung cancer and sleep apnea are becoming major health concerns, while a shortage of chest specialists is placing Taiwan’s critical care and disease prevention systems under increasing pressure. Lung Crisis: Health Alert takes an in-depth look at Taiwan’s growing respiratory health crisis and medical challenges.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 898
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Blue Moment - EP 2
programme.desc: This gripping drama centers on the looming threats of massive meteorological disasters and their impact on human lives. It follows the unwavering dedication of a Special Disaster Management team who armed with expertise and courage, risk everything on the front lines to save lives.

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 30
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2226
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 9
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] On the pretext of recovering gambling debts from Lam Yiu, Hok-lai and Yau-wai conspire to douse Lam Ching with red paint. As the matter gets out of hand, the Fongs are shocked to realize Lam Ching has a convicted elder brother called Lam Yiu. Lam Ching is under pressure due to her family members’ sarcasm and accusations, so she writes a letter to Yeung-tin to explain her need to reconsider their marriage.

programme.title: Strange Tales of Tang Dynasty III to Changan - EP 6
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Amid Chang'an's power shifts, Lu Lingfeng and Su Wuming lead their detective team back to the capital, turning a teahouse into a covert base. They tackle bizarre cases from haunted temples to court plots, culminating in a polo match that tests their fates.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2226
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Treasures Around - EP 14
programme.desc: The quirky and clever Shan Dandan (Xu Lu), who dreams of becoming a jade appraiser, crosses paths with Pei Pei (Bi Wen Jun), the wayward heir to a jade business. Initially at odds, the two develop a love-hate relationship as they face challenges together.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 9
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] On the pretext of recovering gambling debts from Lam Yiu, Hok-lai and Yau-wai conspire to douse Lam Ching with red paint. As the matter gets out of hand, the Fongs are shocked to realize Lam Ching has a convicted elder brother called Lam Yiu. Lam Ching is under pressure due to her family members’ sarcasm and accusations, so she writes a letter to Yeung-tin to explain her need to reconsider their marriage.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 8
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Chi-kwan clashes with some internet celebrity KOL in the street. Ko Sham, who is handling the incident, isn’t kind to her.
